title: 菊花賞の後に・ボクが三冠ウマ娘！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio conquers the Kikuka Sho and claims
her Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Teio! Congratulations on your Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Thank you for such a moving performance!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yaaay! The great Tokai Teio is now a Triple
Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio gives a triumphant cry and thrusts
three fingers up in the air.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! I'd like to express my sincerest gratitude
for all the hard work that you've done, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, I am a Triple Crown champion, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm up there with Prez, my mission is
finally complete!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Nah, just messing with ya! As if my goal was ever to just be on her level!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna stop as her equal. I'm gonna
surpass her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after becoming a Triple Crown champion,
Tokai Teio won't shake off her true dream!
choice_data_list: Go further than she ever has!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll show them all the power of a Triple
Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So, I wanna figure out what race I should aim for
next. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking into account she just blew the
long-distance Kikuka Sho race out of the water...
choice_data_list: Shoot for the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh! That was Prez's first senior G1 race too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm just one step behind her. All right. The senior
chapter of the great Teio's legend is about to
begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set our sights on our first senior-year race
goal—the spring Tenno Sho!
